creator: ilkka.tengvall@iki.fi
text:
I reopen this ticket. It was not enough to touch the samba dependency. Still if I try replacing php56 packages with php72 packages, it removes nextcloud. So there is more to the dependency.

See here:


 # pkg install nextcloud
